ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "size_chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the size chart belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the size chart is applicable to */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the size (e.g., 6-8, 34) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the size type */,
  "size_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the size type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the region (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "product_video" TEXT /* Video URL of the product (if applicable) */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Features of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in_stock, out_of_stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit_card, paypal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the order item belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the order item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "customer_address2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
